com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Interface TestCaseStatus

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    TestCaseStatusImpl

    public interface TestCaseStatus
    Execution status for a given test case. This information can be retrieved by the IExecutionServer.getTestCaseStatus(Job...).
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long getEndTime()
      Returns the test case end time
      java.io.File getLogFile()
      Returns the log file where the test case was logged
      long getStartTime()
      Returns the test case start time
      TestCase getTestCase()
      Returns the test case reference
      VerdictKind getVerdictKind()
      Returns the test case verdict
      java.lang.String getVerdictReason()
      Returns the verdict reason
